== Notes for [[Item:Q98284|Q98284]] ==

Shlomo ,

son of Hunya and nn to: nn

1) Jacov to: nn

--------------------
source: http://www.geni.com/people/Shlomo-ben-Hunya/6000000000802702003?through=6000000000802700021

Shlomo ,

son of Hunya and nn to: nn

1) Jacov to: nn

Mudou-se de Selêucida-sobre-o-Tigre para Ctesiphon em 117, durante a guerra entre Roma e os Partos.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6702EFBAD53751EFBBF89829A6488A4D97CA
geni:6000000000802702003

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
